---
title: "About Me"
---

## Professional Bio

I am Yusuf Bora Çavdar, a 3rd-year Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University, expecting to graduate in 2026. My academic interests are centered around **Data Science** and **Data Analytics**. I am passionate about using data-driven insights to optimize processes and solve complex engineering problems.

I am particularly interested in exploring the intersections of data analytics within Human Resources, focusing on Training and Development. Additionally, I have a strong interest in Lean and Six Sigma methodologies.

## Interests and Activities

I actively participate in various student activities and personal development areas:

\* **Financial Literacy Society:** I am an active member interested in financial management and economic analysis.

\* **Scouting:** As an active member of the scouting community, I focus on leadership, teamwork, and outdoor skills.

\* **Language Learning:** I am currently dedicated to learning German to enhance my professional and international communication skills.

## Curriculum Vitae

You can find my detailed professional background and academic achievements in my CV.

[Click here to download my CV (PDF)](files/cv.pdf)
